description: Maps each DFIR tool on D:/ to its update source for automated or semi-automated update checking. Optional fields per tool: native_update_cmd (string) for tools with built-in update/sync commands, ancillary_configs (array) for additional config/data sources to update alongside the tool, hash_verify (bool) to attempt SHA-256 verification from GitHub release notes.

tools.name: Arsenal Image Mounter
tools.notes: Extract zip and replace folder contents. Rename folder to match new version. Requires .NET runtime.

tools.name: Encrypted Disk Detector
tools.notes: Single EXE from Magnet Forensics. No automated API available; must check download page manually. Version encoded in filename as EDDv310 = 3.1.0.

tools.name: Encrypted Disk Hunter
tools.notes: Standalone EXE. Original site (yourealwaysbe.com) and GitHub repo are offline. Tool appears abandoned/stable at v1.10. Manual check only.

tools.name: FTK Imager
tools.notes: Distributed by Exterro (formerly AccessData). Requires form submission to download. No API or direct download link available. Must update manually.

tools.name: KAPE
tools.notes: KAPE binary is distributed by Kroll (requires license/registration). KapeFiles (targets/modules) are on GitHub at EricZimmerman/KapeFiles and can be updated via KAPE's built-in updater. Use 'kape --update' to sync KapeFiles from GitHub. The binary itself requires manual download from Kroll.

tools.name: Magnet RAM Capture
tools.notes: Single EXE from Magnet Forensics. No automated API; check download page manually. Version encoded in filename as v120 = 1.2.0. Tool may be discontinued; verify availability.

tools.name: WinPmem
tools.notes: Windows memory acquisition tool by Velocidex. Single EXE. Used to create physical memory dumps for Volatility analysis.

tools.name: Belkasoft RAM Capturer
tools.notes: Free RAM capture utility from Belkasoft. Requires download from website. Lightweight tool for volatile memory acquisition.

tools.name: Velociraptor
tools.notes: Endpoint visibility and collection tool. Single Windows EXE for both server and client modes. Use 'velociraptor gui' for local triage.

tools.name: WinFE
tools.notes: Windows Forensic Environment. A bootable Windows PE environment with write-blocking. Must be built manually using provided scripts. Check winfe.net for latest build instructions.

tools.name: Autopsy
tools.notes: Open-source digital forensics platform built on The Sleuth Kit. Windows installer (.msi). Supports disk images, file system analysis, keyword search, timeline, and modules.

tools.name: The Sleuth Kit
tools.notes: Command-line file system forensic analysis tools. Includes fls, icat, mmls, etc. Windows builds provided as zip in GitHub releases.

tools.name: Volatility 3
tools.notes: Memory forensics framework (Python). Install via 'pip install volatility3' or download source. Requires Python 3.7+. Analyzes memory dumps from WinPmem, Magnet RAM Capture, etc.

tools.name: ExifTool
tools.notes: Windows standalone executable distributed as zip from exiftool.org. Also available via winget and scoop.

tools.name: HashMyFiles
tools.notes: NirSoft utility. Also available via winget and scoop for easier updates.

tools.name: hashcat
tools.notes: Released as .7z archive. Download from hashcat.net. Also available via winget and scoop. Requires OpenCL-compatible GPU drivers.

tools.name: PhotoRec / TestDisk
tools.notes: PhotoRec is bundled with TestDisk by CGSecurity. Also available via winget and scoop.

tools.name: Timeline Explorer
tools.notes: Part of Eric Zimmerman's tools suite. Download from ericzimmerman.github.io. The site provides a batch downloader script (Get-ZimmermanTools.ps1) that can update all EZ tools at once. Direct zip URL: https://f001.backblazeb2.com/file/EricZimmermanTools/net6/TimelineExplorer.zip

tools.name: Hindsight
tools.notes: Chrome/Chromium browser forensics tool. Parses browsing history, cache, cookies, downloads, etc. Standalone Windows EXE available in GitHub releases.

tools.name: bulk_extractor
tools.notes: High-performance digital forensics data extraction tool. Scans disk images and extracts emails, URLs, credit card numbers, etc. Windows builds in GitHub releases.

tools.name: FLOSS
tools.notes: FireEye Labs Obfuscated String Solver. Extracts obfuscated strings from malware binaries. Part of Mandiant's FLARE toolkit. Windows zip in GitHub releases.

tools.name: Hayabusa
tools.notes: Windows event log fast forensics timeline generator and threat hunting tool. Written in Rust. Uses Sigma-based detection rules. Outputs CSV timelines.

tools.name: RegRipper
tools.notes: Windows Registry forensic analysis tool. Clone or download from GitHub. Requires Perl runtime or use the compiled EXE. No formal versioned releases; check commits for updates.

tools.name: LogonTracer
tools.notes: Visualizes Windows logon events using Neo4j graph database. By JPCERT/CC. Requires Python 3 and Neo4j. Useful for lateral movement investigation.

tools.name: RecuperaBit
tools.notes: NTFS file system reconstruction tool (Python). Recovers directory structure from damaged or partially overwritten NTFS partitions.

tools.name: ntfstool
tools.notes: NTFS forensic analysis tool. Reads MFT, extracts file records, and analyzes NTFS structures. Windows EXE in GitHub releases.

tools.name: Log2timeline / Plaso
tools.notes: Super timeline generation engine (Python). Install via 'pip install plaso' on Windows or use Docker. Parses 100+ artifact types into a unified timeline.

tools.name: NetworkMiner
tools.notes: Free edition available from Netresec. Download as zip and extract. Version in folder name uses hyphens (3-1 = 3.1). Check netresec.com for latest version.

tools.name: Nmap
tools.notes: Portable deployment. Also available via winget and scoop (scoop uses portable variant).

tools.name: Wireshark
tools.notes: Network protocol analyzer. Portable version available as zip from wireshark.org. Also available via winget and scoop.

tools.name: ALEAPP
tools.notes: Android Logs Events And Protobuf Parser. Python-based. Clone from GitHub or download release zip. Requires Python 3. Parses Android artifacts into HTML/TSV reports.

tools.name: iLEAPP
tools.notes: iOS Logs Events And Properties Parser. Python-based. Clone from GitHub or download release zip. Requires Python 3. Parses iOS artifacts into HTML/TSV reports.

tools.name: ArtEx
tools.notes: Artifact Examiner by DoubleBlak. Mobile forensics artifact viewer and parser. Download from DoubleBlak website.

tools.name: UniGetUI
tools.notes: Now owned by Devolutions. Self-updates through its own interface. Also available via winget and scoop.

linux_reference_tools.name: Guymager
linux_reference_tools.description: Linux GUI forensic disk imager with E01/dd/AFF support

linux_reference_tools.name: dc3dd
linux_reference_tools.description: DoD Cyber Crime Center patched version of dd with forensic features

linux_reference_tools.name: ewfacquire (libewf)
linux_reference_tools.description: Library and tools for reading/writing Expert Witness Format (E01) images

linux_reference_tools.name: Disk Arbitrator
linux_reference_tools.description: macOS disk write-blocking utility for forensic acquisition

linux_reference_tools.name: Zeek
linux_reference_tools.description: Network analysis framework (formerly Bro). Generates rich protocol logs

linux_reference_tools.name: Suricata
linux_reference_tools.description: High-performance network IDS/IPS and security monitoring engine

linux_reference_tools.name: Arkime
linux_reference_tools.description: Full packet capture and search system (formerly Moloch)

linux_reference_tools.name: Timesketch
linux_reference_tools.description: Collaborative forensic timeline analysis tool by Google

linux_reference_tools.name: DFTimewolf
linux_reference_tools.description: Framework for orchestrating forensic collection and processing pipelines

linux_reference_tools.name: GRR Rapid Response
linux_reference_tools.description: Remote live forensics framework for incident response by Google

linux_reference_tools.name: UAC
linux_reference_tools.description: Unix-like Artifact Collector. Shell-based live forensic collection for Linux/macOS

linux_reference_tools.name: libimobiledevice
linux_reference_tools.description: Cross-platform library for communicating with iOS devices natively

linux_reference_tools.name: Foremost
linux_reference_tools.description: Console-based file carving tool based on file headers and footers

linux_reference_tools.name: Scalpel
linux_reference_tools.description: High-performance file carving tool, successor to Foremost

ez_tools_updater.description: PowerShell script to update all Eric Zimmerman tools at once (Timeline Explorer, KAPE modules, etc.)

kape_module_updater.description: Update KAPE targets and modules from GitHub
